feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: I Thought I Lost You
entry.summary:
Author: A_HumbleServant

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 666Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: “You thought this was a dream?!” His face contorting into something close to devastation, “I've tried to get in contact with you for years. You left me! You left me alone and scared in the godforsaken hospital to be told my son was dead, and you never came back.”   Evan had tears streaming down his face and all Eddie could do was stare.   No, no that's not—   Oh

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: (My Prison Was) Just An Open Cage
entry.summary:
Author: nerdwegian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 167,458Chapters: 16/18Kudos: 205

Summary: Eddie is working hard on figuring himself out, getting a life, and also reestablishing contact with Buck after worrying about them drifting apart and their friendship changing. Realizing that sometimes people misunderstand his relationship with Buck should not be the shock it is. Also, if Chris could stop launching verbal sneak attacks on him, he'd appreciate it. Meanwhile, Buck's learning to parent a toddler while not at all being insecure about something said by one Margaret Buckley. He's just studiously avoiding the word 'Parent' like the plague, and otherwise doing his damn best. or If Buck had a nickel for every time someone left him their kid in their will without his knowledge–well, he’d have two nickels. Which isn’t a lot, but it’s weird that it’s happened twice now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: think about it
entry.summary:
Author: coldbam

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,845Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: “I might regret asking this but…” Ian trails off, hesitating until Eddie nudges him, urging him to continue. “Buck,” he says, simply. Eddie frowns. He doesn’t remember Buck doing anything particularly weird or notable. Hell, he doesn’t even recall him and Ian talking that much. Is that weird? Is Ian worried that he didn’t get the best friend stamp of approval, or something? “What about him? I mean, he can be a little much sometimes, but he mellows out—” Ian shakes his head. “No. I’m talking about: Buck, your very handsome and very involved best friend, who is also queer...” He trails off again, as if he’s waiting for Eddie to fill in the blank. When he doesn’t, Ian finally says: “Do I have anything to worry about there?” *Or, he does in fact have something to worry about.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,485Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 3

entry.title: What's Past Is Prologue
entry.summary:
Author: Duochanfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,580Chapters: 7/63Kudos: 181

Summary: Moving to LA with Shannon and Christopher was supposed to save his marriage. But Eddie Diaz is facing more than just recovery from his injuries in the sandbox. A chance meeting with former Navy SEAL Evan Buckley, and life takes a strong turn as the two rekindle a friendship that had begun in the sandbox, and their future starts to look just that little bit brighter.

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,455Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 317

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,486Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 56

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: Panoramic View
entry.summary:
Author: Aida_Sparks

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,597Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 358

Summary: “Where’s Christopher?” The question ripped out of him before he could think. “Is he okay? Did I – did I lose him?” Buck’s face fell. “Chris is fine. He’s in Texas, remember? With your parents.” Texas. Eddie’s mind snagged on that. It didn’t feel right. Not at all. “No,” he muttered, shaking his head despite the rip of pain it caused. “No, that’s- that’s not right. We came here from Texas years ago. He came with me. We’re here now. He’s here.” He tried to sit up, but the effort sent his body crashing back against the pillow. “Eddie, stop.” Buck’s voice turned firm, but not angry. Just scared. “Chris isn’t here, but he is okay. He’s not lost. You’re here with me. Chris is in Texas. He’s safe, I swear.” OR The fallout from a major head injury blurs the lines between Eddie’s past and present, forcing him and Buck to confront an uncertain future together.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 315,722Chapters: 65/?Kudos: 127

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,725Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: What a night to forget.
entry.summary:
Author: Absolute_Maniac

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,700Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 557

Summary: “You might want to see this…” He reached over with a piece of paper in his hand. Buck took it and turned his phone over to him in return. Eddie bit into his fist as he studied the picture. Buck looked down at the paper in his hand and turned it over to the right side. It was a copy of a marriage license for Mr. Evan Buckley-Diaz and Mr. Edmundo Buckley-Diaz.orBuck and Eddie, wake up married after a night of drinking with no memory of the night before. This is the story of how they decide to deal with this drunken decision while learning a lot about themselves and each other as they go from best friends to platonic husbands and, at last, to lovers.

entry.title: We've Done Weirder Things
entry.summary:
Author: edsawrites

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,301Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 54

Summary: Buck accidentally kisses Eddie on the forehead while greeting him one afternoon. It should have been a weird one time thing, instead, it becomes an ongoing problem, and eventually a much bigger one, as they seem to enjoy deeper and deeper levels of affection. Neither Buck or Eddie are ready to examine what any of it means. But they've done weirder things.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 245,685Chapters: 60/?Kudos: 157

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: Postcards From LA
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,632Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 85

Summary: Eddie catches that redeye flight back to El Paso and returns to life in Texas with Christopher, and everything is as it should be. It's different and juggling Christopher, basic training, his grief is hard, and adapting to living with his parents right there to question his every move is complicated, but here with Christopher is where he's meant to be. Right? But when Eddie gets a postcard in the mail from one Evan "Buck" Buckley, suddenly he's reminded that maybe everything isn't as fine as it seems and that everything important isn't just here in Texas.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Origin Of Buck Cookies = A kiss
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,533Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Buck starts leaving homemade cookies around the house for Eddie, thinking they’re just a sweet treat. Then Eddie creates a rule. Every cookie he steals from the jar earns him one kiss from Buck. What begins as a joke quickly turns into a daily game of missing cookies, hidden notes, stolen kisses, and two men finding more and more excuses to stay close. The only problem? Eddie really loves Buck’s cookies. 🍪💋

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: How to Put a Buckley to Sleep
entry.summary:
Author: mynameismery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,059Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 678

Summary: “I cracked the code,” Buck whispered with a grin, looking down at Theo. Eddie turned his attention to Buck. “What are you talking about?” Buck looked at him, the grin still on his face. “He won’t make bedtime easy, right?” “Four-year-olds rarely do,” Eddie said, waiting for Buck to see where he was going with this. “Well, I cracked the code last night, and it worked like a charm.” He said proudly. “I should write a parenting book.” Eddie scoffed. “Aw, look at you, fostering a kid for five minutes and thinking you’re an expert now. That’s cute.” He shook his head and looked back at Theo. “Give it a few more months and then get back to me, okay?” “Observe,” Buck said to Eddie as he walked over to Theo and settled on the bed with him. OR Buck has discovered a great way to get Theo to fall asleep within two minutes. So great that even Eddie is impressed. What Buck doesn’t know is that Eddie’s absolutely going to use that discovery against him.   BONUS PART ADDED

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: is it over now?
entry.summary:
Author: aftermathbaby

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,013Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 32

Summary: On the way back from a call, Buck is abducted and brutally assaulted. The aftermath is messy: Buck insists he’s fine (he's not), Eddie is wracked with guilt (predictably), and Christopher knows way too much (as usual). As the 118 rallies around them, everyone has to grapple with the fallout of the violence and what it means for Buck, for Buck and Eddie, and for themselves.
